query:
INSERT INTO org.groups AS t
                 (id, name, description, kind, version, created_at)
               VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
               ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
                 name        = EXCLUDED.name,
                 description = EXCLUDED.description,
                 kind        = EXCLUDED.kind,
                 version     = EXCLUDED.version + 1
               WHERE t.version = EXCLUDED.version
